params.name: Forbidden Fruit
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Super Treasure Maps (5%), Wishing (0.8%)
params.description:
On Aug 24, 200,000 BC, Adam and Eve ate the Forbidden Fruit and were exiled from the Garden of Eden.
Adam and Eve were tempted by a serpent and ate the forbidden fruit, red apples growing from the tree of life. After Adam had tasted the forbidden fruit, he hid from God, realizing he was naked. God saw Adam's shame and his desire to learn truths. A man with wisdom had broken the sanctity of the Garden of Eden and was cast out by God.
